description: Nexus OS UI repair ticket file produced by nexus-ui-repair scout v1.0.0. Consumed by Claude Code during the human + Claude Code repair phase.

fields.comparison_summary: ComparisonSummary produced by the comparison harness. Reports confirmed_match / unknown_new / confirmed_miss counts, F1 score, and whether the run was partial.
fields.generated_at: RFC3339 timestamp recording when the ticket file was written to disk.
fields.halt: Optional HaltReason. Present only when the scout halted before finishing a full run.
fields.page: The Nexus OS page or sub-system this ticket batch targets (e.g. 'chat', 'cli_provider').
fields.schema_version: Semver string identifying this schema revision.
fields.scout_version: Version string of the nexus-ui-repair scout that produced this file.
fields.tickets: Array of RepairTicket objects. One per confirmed or suspected bug.

repair_ticket_fields.component_file_hint: Best-guess relative path to the React or Rust file most likely to contain the fix.
repair_ticket_fields.dom_context: DomContext with a CSS selector and a small slice of surrounding markup.
repair_ticket_fields.error_strings: Array of error strings captured from the DOM or console at scout time.
repair_ticket_fields.id: GT-NNN when the ticket matches a ground-truth entry, otherwise SCOUT-NNN for unknown_new findings.
repair_ticket_fields.reproduction_steps: Ordered array of reproduction step strings.
repair_ticket_fields.screenshot_path: Optional filesystem path to a screenshot captured at scout time.
repair_ticket_fields.severity: One of critical, high, medium, low.
repair_ticket_fields.suggested_fix_category: One of wiring, missing_endpoint, missing_component, labeling, ux_polish.
